## Checklist

- [ ] This pull request adds one project only.
- [ ] I have evaluated and can personally recommend the project.
- [ ] The project directly targets or materially supports Cloudflare Workers.
- [ ] For a Showcase entry, this is an end-user application and the description names its Cloudflare primitives.
- [ ] The project is documented, maintained, non-archived, and non-deprecated.
- [ ] The entry uses the required format and an objective description.
- [ ] I checked that the link works and uses the canonical URL.
- [ ] I disclosed any affiliation with the project.
